w.d: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way; finding something good by luck Discovering that old friend by ~ was wonderful The ~ of finding money in an old coat pocket
Lasting for a very short time; transitory The beauty of cherry blossoms is ~ ~ insects live only for a few days
Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing His ~ speech moved the audience to tears She gave an ~ presentation on climate change
Present, appearing, or found everywhere Smartphones have become ~ in modern society Social media is ~ among teenagers
Delightful to eat; delicious The ~ pastries in the bakery window looked irresistible The chef prepared ~ dishes for the feast
